name: EA₹N Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: UPI spends via IDFC FIRST Bank Mobile App
Other spends (including offline, online, utility, insurance, fuel, and third-party UPI)

additionalBenefits: Fixed deposit backed virtual RuPay credit card (minimum FD ₹5,000)
No income proof or credit score documentation required
1% cashback on UPI spends made via IDFC FIRST Bank Mobile App
0.5% cashback on other UPI spends, online spends, utility, insurance, and fuel spends
Cashback is automatically credited to the card account in the next cycle (capped at ₹500 per cycle)
Personal accident cover of ₹2,00,000 and lost card liability of ₹25,000

salaried: Fixed Deposit backed card; minimum FD amount of ₹5,000
selfEmployed: Fixed Deposit backed card; minimum FD amount of ₹5,000

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Secured credit card backed by fixed deposit (min ₹5,000 FD). No credit check or salary slip required.
1% cashback on UPI transactions made specifically via IDFC FIRST Bank mobile app QR scans.
0.5% cashback on other spends including utility, insurance, fuel, online/offline, and other third-party UPI apps.
Combined monthly cashback is capped at ₹500 per statement cycle. EMI transactions are excluded.
Annual fee of ₹499 is waived on spending ₹1,00,000 in the previous anniversary year.
